schema.name: Wakr Data Lake
schema.description: Star-schema data lake for Wakr market intelligence platform. Tracks towboat/watersport boat listings, pricing, inventory velocity, dealer performance, and member activity across national dealer networks.
changelog: v1.4.0 (2026-03-06): Figma dashboard analytics audit. Added dim_brand_tier (price-based segment config table). Added brand_tier_key FK on dim_manufacturer. Added state_name to dim_geography. Added computed metric columns to all Phase-1 mart tables: sell_through_rate, days_supply, mom_listing_change_pct (mart_inventory_summary); pct_listings_with_price_cut, discount_pressure_pct (mart_pricing_trends); dom_status, aging_risk_level (mart_time_on_market); demand_supply_ratio, momentum_status [PENDING] (mart_estimated_velocity); delta_week_units, market_share_pct [PENDING] (mart_dealer_scorecard). territory on dim_dealer intentionally omitted — DMA from dim_geography.dma serves this purpose. Intelligence signals feed intentionally omitted — computed at runtime. price_tier column omitted — not needed as stored field.

v1.3.0 (2026-03-05): Added dim_dealer_network for multi-location dealer group rollup. Replaced single manufacturer_key FK on dim_dealer with bridge_dealer_manufacturer (many-to-many). Renamed dim_boat_model configurable fields to base_* to clarify they represent manufacturer baseline specs, not per-instance configuration.
v1.2.0 (2026-03-04): Initial JSON export of ERD v3. Split dim_boat into dim_boat_model (type/template) and dim_boat_instance (physical unit).
notes: All fact tables carry both boat_key (instance) and boat_model_key (model) FKs to support aggregation at either grain without extra joins.
VIN is nullable on dim_boat_instance — deduplication uses make+model+year+hours+price-tolerance matching across sources.
Phase 2 tables are in development and subject to change with early brand partners.
dim_member uses hashed IDs — no PII in any fact table.
fact_listing_snapshot should be partitioned by date_key (month) and manufacturer prefix for query performance.
Each physical dealer location is a separate dim_dealer row. Roll up to dealer group via dim_dealer_network.
Dealer-to-manufacturer affiliation is many-to-many via bridge_dealer_manufacturer; a primary flag identifies the dealer's primary brand for denormalization convenience.

dim_boat_model base_* fields (base_engine_hp, base_ballast_lbs, base_tower_included) are manufacturer baseline specs for the model. Actual per-instance values are stored on dim_boat_instance and bridge_listing_features.

dim_brand_tier defines price-based boat segments (Entry/Mid/Premium) via min_price/max_price thresholds. Segment for a given listing is resolved by matching listed_price against these ranges at query time.
territory on dim_dealer is intentionally not stored as a separate column — use dim_geography.dma (Nielsen DMA) as the territory proxy.
demand_supply_ratio = boats_sold_t30 / active_listings. Demand is defined as count of boats sold over the measurement period — no external signal required.
momentum_status definition PENDING user decision — reserved placeholder in mart_estimated_velocity.
market_share_pct definition PENDING user research — reserved placeholder in mart_dealer_scorecard.

dimensions.description: Standard date spine used across all fact tables.
Geographic hierarchy used for regional performance analytics and location-based filtering.

columns.name: state_name
columns.notes: Full state name, e.g. Florida. Required for Regional tab State column display.

columns.name: dma
columns.notes: Nielsen DMA for media alignment. Also serves as the dealer territory proxy — see dim_dealer notes.

dimensions.description: Data provenance tracking for every fact record. Enables source trust hierarchy filtering.

columns.name: source_name
columns.notes: e.g. BoatTrader, YachtWorld, Dealer Feed, Manufacturer, DTC Member

dimensions.description: Boat manufacturers / brands. Root of the boat type hierarchy.

foreign_keys.notes: Segment tier for this manufacturer's primary product line. Resolved via dim_brand_tier price ranges.

columns.name: brand_tier_key
columns.notes: FK to dim_brand_tier. Replaces the legacy brand_tier VARCHAR field for structured config-driven segmentation.

dimensions.description: Structured configuration table defining price-based boat market segments (e.g. Entry, Mid, Premium). Each row defines a named tier with a price floor and optional ceiling. Segment for any given listing is resolved by matching listed_price (new boat) against min_price/max_price ranges at query time. Powers the Segment Momentum view on the Overview tab.

columns.name: min_price
columns.notes: Minimum new-boat list price (inclusive) for this segment

columns.name: max_price
columns.notes: Maximum new-boat list price (exclusive). NULL = no upper bound (top-tier segment).

columns.name: display_order
columns.notes: Sort order for dashboard segment display (1 = lowest tier)

dimensions.description: Dealer groups and multi-location networks. A dealer network (e.g. a regional chain or franchise group) may operate many individual dealer locations. Each location is a separate dim_dealer row; this table provides the rollup entity for group-level analytics such as total network inventory, network-wide sell-through, and aggregated dealer scorecards.

columns.name: network_name
columns.notes: e.g. 'Lake Powell Marine Group', 'Southeast Malibu Dealers'

dimensions.description: Individual boat dealer locations. Each physical location is a separate row. Roll up to dealer group via dealer_network_key → dim_dealer_network. Dealers may represent multiple manufacturers; all brand affiliations are tracked via bridge_dealer_manufacturer. The primary_manufacturer_key is a denormalized convenience FK for the dealer's primary/majority brand.

foreign_keys.notes: Denormalized primary brand; full list via bridge_dealer_manufacturer

columns.name: primary_manufacturer_key
columns.notes: Primary brand affiliation — full multi-brand list in bridge_dealer_manufacturer

dimensions.description: DTC members registered on wakr.co. PII-safe — hashed IDs only.

columns.name: member_id_hashed
columns.notes: SHA-256 hash of source member ID — no PII

dimensions.description: Lakes and waterways where towboats are used. Unique to the watersports market — supports usage-pattern analytics.

The TYPE/TEMPLATE dimension — one row per make/model/year combination. Represents the manufacturer's base product specification. base_* fields (base_engine_hp, base_ballast_lbs, base_tower_included) are the factory-standard configuration for the model and should not be confused with actual per-instance values, which are stored on dim_boat_instance and bridge_listing_features.

columns.name: base_engine_hp
columns.notes: Factory standard HP for this model. Actual instance HP may differ (upgrades) — see dim_boat_instance / bridge_listing_features

columns.name: base_tower_included
columns.notes: True if tower is standard on this model. Actual presence on a specific boat tracked on dim_boat_instance

columns.name: base_ballast_lbs
columns.notes: Factory standard ballast. Actual ballast on a specific boat tracked on dim_boat_instance / bridge_listing_features

dimensions.description: The PHYSICAL UNIT dimension — one row per actual boat (VIN or surrogate). Many instances per model. Stores actual as-delivered/as-listed configuration — use this for per-hull values that may differ from the model baseline (e.g. upgraded engine, added ballast, aftermarket tower).

columns.name: vin
columns.notes: Nullable — older/used boats often lack VIN; deduplication uses make+model+year+hours+price-tolerance

columns.name: current_hours
columns.notes: Updated as new listing data arrives

columns.name: actual_engine_hp
columns.notes: Actual HP if known and differs from model base; null = assume base model spec

columns.name: has_tower
columns.notes: Actual tower presence on this unit; null = unknown

columns.name: actual_ballast_lbs
columns.notes: Actual ballast on this unit; null = assume base model spec

dimensions.description: Competitor brands for Phase 2 competitive overlay analytics.

facts.description: Core fact table. One row per listing per day. Backbone of pricing, time-on-market, and inventory level analytics.
facts.grain: one row per listing per day

columns.name: original_list_price
columns.notes: First observed price for this listing

columns.name: is_removed
columns.notes: True on last day seen — inferred sold or delisted

facts.description: One row per inferred sale event. A listing removed after active status is treated as a likely sale. confidence_score allows downstream analytics to discount low-confidence records.
facts.grain: one row per inferred sale event

facts.description: Impressions, clicks, and leads for listings actively hosted on the Wakr platform. Powers Dealer Performance Indicators, Model-Level Impressions, and Lead Activity Tracking.
facts.grain: one row per listing per day

facts.description: Activity from wakr.co DTC members — boat ownership, lake visits, lessons, dealer touchpoints.
facts.grain: one row per member activity event

facts.description: Browsing, comparison, and purchase events on the Wakr marketplace. Enables demand shift detection before inventory data reflects it. Anonymous sessions have no member_key.

bridges.description: Many-to-many affiliation between dealer locations and manufacturers/brands. A dealer may be an authorized dealer for multiple brands (e.g. Malibu + Axis + Centurion). The is_primary flag identifies the dealer's primary brand for convenience denormalization. Use this table for any multi-brand dealer queries; the primary_manufacturer_key FK on dim_dealer is a denormalized shortcut for single-brand lookups.

columns.name: is_primary
columns.notes: True for the dealer's dominant brand

bridges.description: Multi-valued listing features extracted from scrape text (e.g. tower type, ballast configuration, electronics). One listing → many feature rows. Used for comparable listing matching in the Trade-In & Valuation Application.

columns.name: feature_category
columns.notes: e.g. electronics, ballast, tower, upholstery, engine_upgrade

marts.description: Pre-aggregated active listing counts and inventory turnover by make/model/region/week. Powers the Active Listings Monitor and Regional Performance dashboard views.

computed_columns.name: sell_through_rate
computed_columns.notes: units_sold / active_listings for the period. Demand defined as boats sold count.

computed_columns.name: mom_listing_change_pct
computed_columns.notes: Month-over-month % change in active listing count. Drives the MoM Change KPI on Inventory tab.

computed_columns.name: days_supply
computed_columns.notes: active_listings / (boats_sold_t30 / 30.0). Displayed per state on the Regional tab Days Supply column.

marts.description: Pre-aggregated advertised price distributions, median prices, and price movement by make/model/region/month. Powers Pricing Visibility and Trade-In Application pricing ranges.

computed_columns.name: pct_listings_with_price_cut
computed_columns.notes: Fraction of active listings where price_change_amount < 0 (or listing_status = 'Price Reduced'). Drives the 'Listings w/ Price Cut' KPI on Pricing tab.

computed_columns.name: discount_pressure_pct
computed_columns.notes: avg((original_list_price - listed_price) / original_list_price) for listings with price cuts. Drives the Discount Pressure column on Model Price Efficiency table.

marts.description: Average and percentile days-on-market by make/model/region/month with aging distribution buckets.

computed_columns.name: dom_status
computed_columns.notes: Velocity-speed classification based on avg_dom thresholds: Fast (<15d) | Healthy (15-22d) | Slow (23-30d) | Very Slow (30d+). Drives the Pricing tab legend and color indicators across all tabs.

computed_columns.name: aging_risk_level
computed_columns.notes: Aging risk classification for Inventory tab Aging Risk column: Elevated | Moderate | Low. Derived from avg_dom vs configurable thresholds.

marts.description: Dealer-location and dealer-network performance metrics benchmarked against network averages: inventory count, avg days-on-market, leads, impressions, estimated sell-through. Supports both individual location view and rolled-up dealer_network_key grouping.

computed_columns.name: delta_week_units
computed_columns.notes: Week-over-week change in units sold for the dealer. Requires weekly sub-aggregation from fact_listing_snapshot / fact_estimated_sale. Drives the Delta Week column on Dealers tab.

computed_columns.name: market_share_pct
computed_columns.notes: PENDING USER RESEARCH: Dealer network's share of total market listings per state. Methodology (numerator/denominator definition) to be confirmed before implementation. Drives Market Share by State chart on Dealers tab.

marts.description: Estimated sell-through counts and pace by make/model/region/month. Powers the Velocity tab rankings table including Demand-Supply Ratio, Momentum, and Avg DOM trend.

computed_columns.name: demand_supply_ratio
computed_columns.notes: boats_sold_t30 / active_listings. Demand is defined as count of boats sold over the measurement period. Drives the Demand-Supply Ratio column on the Velocity tab.

computed_columns.name: momentum_status
computed_columns.notes: PENDING USER DECISION: Classification of inventory movement trend (e.g. Accelerating | Stable | Slowing). Will be based on direction and magnitude of MoM DOM change or sell-through rate change. Definition to be confirmed before implementation.

marts.description: Boat model usage patterns by lake and region. Surfaces which models are actively ridden in specific areas.

relationships.notes: Denormalized primary brand only; full list via bridge_dealer_manufacturer
